originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging Hyperparameter Sweep Algorithm and Simplifying to Nearest Pareto Improvement
summary: Worked on hyperparameter tuning for PufferLib, simplifying the sweep algorithm to 'expected improvement over nearest Pareto point' and integrating full training curves as training data. Also reviewed and merged a PR for the tower climb environment and discussed curriculum learning collaborations.
